Connect

the Future of Freelancing

Harnessing the power of the blockchain to redefine, disrupt and transform the freelance industry

RECOVERYSWAP

Uwerx. Opening the door to a world of limitless potential.

The growth of the freelance industry is accelerating, with more organisations and individuals relying on the cost-effective and flexible services freelancing in itself provides. Uwerx will disrupt and revolutionize this sector with our cutting-edge platform.

Unique features providing a host of competitive advantages

Performance Incentives
Higher Efficiency
Global Talent Pool
Lower Fees
Joining Incentives

Performance Incentives

Platform users will be able to earn tokens through contributing to the platform, such as completing work, or contributing to platform improvement.

These tokens can then be used to purchase goods and services on the Uwerx platform or traded on cryptocurrency exchanges.

Uwerx will also reward high-performing users with bonus tokens and unique opportunities.

Higher Efficiency

Automated processes and decentralized decision-making can streamline the hiring process.

Uwerx will help streamline the job search and project bidding process through automated processes and decentralized decision-making.

This will mean that freelancers and customers can spend less time on administrative tasks and more time focusing on what they do best.

Access To Global Talent

The decentralized nature of the platform allows customers to connect with freelancers from anywhere in the world.

Uwerx will allow for a more open and equitable marketplace, where freelancers and clients can interact directly without intermediaries and with full transparency.

Users from around the world will notice the benefits of emerging blockchain technologies and specifically, the benefits that it offers to freelancers and businesses on freelance platforms and within the growing freelance industry.

Lower Fees

The rise of blockchain-based freelancer platforms provides an advantageous opportunity for freelancers and businesses.

With Uwerx, freelancers no longer have to pay up to 20% of their income in fees, and businesses can save on the cost of a third-party escrow service.

Instead, a flat fee of 1% will be charged on all transactions.

These cost savings make the blockchain-based freelancer platform the smart choice for all involved.

Joining Incentives

The WERX utility token will fulfill numerous purposes, including rewards, access to premium features, and acting as a medium of exchange on the platform.

Users can earn tokens via maintaining activity, performing well, voting, and participating in platform activities. Token burn mechanisms will reduce the total supply and incentivize users to hold and accumulate tokens for higher returns.

WERX will be instrumental in the functioning of the Uwerx platform.

Incoming: The first global Web3 freelance platform

Increased security

Uwerx will enable the use of smart contracts to exchange money for freelance work on the blockchain. The smart contract will act as a self-executing and self-enforcing agreement containing the relevant terms and conditions.

Once both parties agree on something, the blockchain stores the contract making it risk-free to modification or hacking.

Lower fees and transparent pricing

By facilitating the elimination of a third-party escrow service, businesses and freelancers will no longer have to pay these associated fees.
‍
This will present substantial savings for both businesses and freelancers alike.

Improved transparency with verifiable stored records

On the blockchain, both parties can easily avoid risks associated with data loss, hacks and disputes.

Blockchain technology allows freelancers and businesses to preserve their own verifiable and immutable track record. This way, independent workers do not risk losing their hard-earned career records and data.

Integration with a variety of productivity tools

Uwerx will integrate platform functionality to enable freelancers and users to collaborate via the utilization of external productivity tools such as Trello, Asana, and Slack.

This will allow for benefits such as:

1) Centralized task management.

2) Streamlined communication

3) Increased productivity

4) Improved collaboration

Read more here...

Data Driven Demand. Backed By Research And Studies.

Current Statistics of the Freelance
Industry
Projected Future Growth of the Freelance Industry
In just the U.S, freelancers contributed $1.35 trillion to the U.S. economy in 2022
70% of small to medium sized businesses have worked with freelancers at least once
Over half of all businesses employ freelancers, up from 48% in 2018
The freelance economy is the fastest growing industry with 78% year on year growth
There are 57.3 million freelancers in the US alone. By 2027 this number will grow to 86.5 million
At 78% year on year growth in revenue, the United States has the fastest rising freelance economy
Countries with lower domestic work opportunities are seeing a surge in freelance professionals
Global freelance platforms market set to reach $18.3 billion by 2031, with a sustainable CAGR of 15.1%
The fastest growing segment of freelancers is those making $75,000 or more
It is predicted that the percentage of 40 year olds and younger choosing to freelance will rise 87% by 2031

The Uwerx Roadmap

Stage 1

Q3 2023
Genesis
  • Uwerx Website Development
  • Social Communities Launch
  • WERX Token Smart Contract Development
  • WERX Token Audit
  • Marketing Campaign 1
  • Presale Launch

Stage 2

Q4 2023
Consensus
  • Discord Creation at 2,500 Telegram members
  • WERX Token Burn
  • Liquidity Pair Creation (WERX / WETH)
  • Deploy Liquidity on Uniswap
  • Obtain Listings on CoinGecko & CoinMarketCap
  • Marketing Campaign 2

Stage 3

Q1 2024
Smart
  • Contract Ownership Renouncement prior to applications for eligible CEX Listing(s)
  • Begin Development of Uwerx Platform
  • Token Burn Event (as voted by community)
  • Release Uwerx Platform Lite
  • Marketing Campaign 3

      Stage 4

      Q2 2024
      Proof
      • Begin Development of Smart Contracts
      • Initiate Early-Joiner Incentives
      • Marketing Campaign 4
      • Audit(s) of Relevant Smart Contracts
      • Release Uwerx Platform

          Stage 1

          Q1 2023
          Foundation
          • Uwerx Website Development
          • Social Communities Launch
          • WERX Token Smart Contract Development
          • WERX Token Audit
          • Marketing Campaign 1
          • Presale Launch

          Stage 2

          Q3 2023
          Presale
          • Presale Completion
          • WERX Token Burn (if necessary)
          • Liquidity Pair Creation (WERX / WETH)
          • Deploy Liquidity on Uniswap
          • Obtain Listings on CoinGecko & CoinMarketCap
          • Marketing Campaign 2

          Stage 3

          Q4 2023
          Uwerx Lite MVP
          • CEX Listing(s)
          • Begin Development of Uwerx Platform
          • Release Uwerx Platform Lite
          • Marketing Campaign 3

              Stage 4

              Q2 2024
              Uwerx Launch
              • Initiate Early-Joiner Incentives
              • Marketing Campaign 4
              • Audit(s) of Relevant Smart Contracts
              • Release Uwerx Platform

                  Audits Conducted

                  Read Audit
                  Read Audit

                  Access The New Way To Freelance on Uwerx

                  With Uwerx, freelancers will have access to more opportunities whilst being able to utilize a host of unique value-adding tools. Clients and businesses will have access to a wider pool of talent whilst also paying lower fees.

                  ConnectStake

                  FAQs

                  Your most common questions, answered.

                  What is Uwerx?

                  Uwerx aims to revolutionize the industry by launching the first global, blockchain-powered freelance platform. The freelance economy is booming and offers limitless opportunities. Blockchain technology offers numerous benefits for both businesses and freelancers.We implore you to read our Connect at https://uwerx.gitbook.io/uwerx

                  What are Uwerx’s key objectives?

                  Through the utilization of blockchain technology, Uwerx will:
                  ‍
                  - Increase trust and security
                  - Substantially lower fees for both businesses and freelancers
                  - Enable verifiable stored records
                  - Disrupt traditional freelance platforms whilst providing tremendous value to both  businesses and freelancers

                  What blockchain network will Uwerx be located on?

                  Polygon, due to its established position as one of the most  most popular layer-two blockchain networks to Polygon. In addition, this makes sense as the Uwerx platform itself will be built on the Polygon network.

                  What is the WERX contract address?

                  0x9b2CFE1608250BEA375c6199b474B402BaD920da

                  Why will freelancers use Uwerx as opposed to traditional freelancing platforms?

                  Uwerx will disrupt traditional freelance platforms to provide value like no other; through the introduction of webinars, joining incentives, performance incentives.

                  What security measures has Uwerx taken?

                  Uwerx has undertaken two audits, you can find our audits below.

                  Contract ownership will be renounced, this provides numerous benefits in terms of safety and security for users and investors. If you are unsure what renouncing contract ownership means, please read section [6] in the Conect.

                  As of 3rd August 2023, two more sets of audits will take place.

                  How do I join the community to talk about Uwerx?

                  We invite you and welcome you to join the Uwerx conversation in our Telegram at https://t.me/uwerx_network.

                  Please also follow us on Twitter at https://twitter.com/uwerx_network

                  When will I receive my WERX tokens?

                  You will receive your WERX tokens at the end of the presale. There is a vesting period which you can see further details in the 'Vesting Period for Sustainability' section of our Connect here.

                  Our Team

                  David is a seasoned entrepreneur with vast experience in start-ups. He is the founder of Uwerx and envisions the disruption and transformation of the growing freelance industry. Read more here...
